name: LET ME OUT
short_description: LET ME OUT - is a psychological horror with a depressing mood. The life of the main character lies in your hands. Help him get out of his difficult condition and walk this path with him.
detailed_description:
"Every day for me is nothing but discouragement and despair. What is the point of living? For whom to live?
I have come to the place where it all began, where I used to live. Maybe this place will answer all my questions."

The protagonist comes to his hometown to search for answers. But when he finds the very place where it all began, his worst nightmares get in the way. The protagonist needs to figure out what is happening to him and put an end to all his horrors.
You need to explore creepy locations, collect notes, with which you need to find out what's going on in the head of the main character.

  • Darkness. There will be a lot of darkness on your path. You decide how to pass it - to surrender or to fight to the end.
  • Grim soundtrack. It is a representation of the main character's nightmares.
  • Three different endings. The main character's life depends on you.


Vhdufk ehwwhu.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Turkish
